name: mlm-dx
description: MLM-DX monorepo with Next.js frontend and Cloudflare Workers backend

scripts.dev:local: concurrently "pnpm --filter mlm-dx-worker run dev:local" "pnpm --filter mlm-dx-web run dev"
scripts.build:local: pnpm run build:worker:local && pnpm run build:web
scripts.deploy:all:prod: pnpm run deploy:worker:prod && pnpm run deploy:web:prod
scripts.db:create:local: echo 'Local D1 database is created automatically when running wrangler dev'
scripts.lint:all: pnpm run lint:web && pnpm run lint:worker
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter mlm-dx-web run type-check && pnpm --filter mlm-dx-worker run type-check
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules apps/*/dist apps/*/.next apps/worker/.wrangler
scripts.start:prod: pnpm run build:local && pnpm run deploy:all:prod
